ops.body: 2026-07-18: the judged-gating half shipped as C3 (cc-steer local main c89527e8 lineage: cc_steer/retrain/judged.py, promotion defers to GateResult.promote, golden flag-day loader — supersedes the promote_gate.py framing). C4 shipped the sweep machinery and the 3-arm baseline sweep is RUNNING today under the ~$49 gate (8B done: Tinker-frame sentinel AUC 0.9301; 4B/9B in flight). After results land, this task's remaining scope is the E14 stage-3 futility pilot only.
